data.title: Polestar Sees 5.3% Increase In Q4 Retail Sales, Order Intake Surges 37.2%
data.description: Polestar CEO Michael Lohscheller says the changes to the company's commercial operations were central to the growth.

data.title: Canadian Natural Resources Sets $4.2 Billion Budget For 2025, Targets 12% Production Growth
data.description: Canadian Natural Resources sets 2025 budget of C$6 billion for production growth and capacity expansion, including acquisitions.

data.title: $1000 Invested In This Stock 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
US 2025 Recession Odds Plummet: Good News Or Warning Sign?
data.description: Trump's tariffs and immigration restrictions could push annualized GDP growth down to 1.5% and drive inflation back up to 3%.

data.title: Japanese Chipmaker Rapidus Sets Sight on Broadcom to Emulate Taiwan Semiconductor's Market Dominance
data.description: Japanese chipmaker Rapidus to supply 2-nm chip samples to Broadcom in June. Japan's focus on semiconductors amid supply chain disruptions. Broadcom eyes $150B AI opportunity backed by 2-nm and 3-nm technology and partnerships with Google and Meta Platforms.
